<Group description="Tema 02 site"> <Variable name="bodyb.tema2" description="Background Principal" type="color" default="#070614" value="#070614"/> <Variable name="contentb.tema2" description="Background secundario" type="color" default="#0d0b24" value="#0d0b24"/> <Variable name="linkb.tema2" description="cor de titulo destaque Principal" type="color" default="#13bcef" value="#13bcef"/> <Variable name="linkd.tema2" description="cor de titulo destaque secundaria" type="color" default="#6948d6" value="#6948d6"/> <Variable name="cor1.tema2" description="Background destaque 01" type="color" default="#eb0b2e" value="#eb0b2e"/> <Variable name="cor2.tema2" description="Background destaque 02" type="color" default="#5d6bd6" value="#5d6bd6"/> <Variable name="corb1.tema2" description="Background destaque 03" type="color" default="#ffcc00" value="#ffcc00"/> <Variable name="corb2.tema2" description="Background destaque 04" type="color" default="#5abf9e" value="#5abf9e"/> <Variable name="corb3.tema2" description="Background destaque 05" type="color" default="#999999" value="#999999"/> <Variable name="headc.tema2" description="Background de destaque 02" type="color" default="#1a1a1a" value="#1a1a1a"/> <Variable name="bodyd.tema2" description="Background de destaque 01" type="color" default="#18113b" value="#18113b"/> <Variable name="mobilem.tema2" description="Menu Mobile background 01" type="color" default="#262626" value="#262626"/> <Variable name="mobiled.tema2" description="Menu Mobile background 02" type="color" default="#fd9f00" value="#702ebf"/> <Variable name="mobilec.tema2" description="Menu Mobile color" type="color" default="#f0f0f0" value="#f0f0f0"/> </Group>
<Group description="Tema 03 site"> <Variable name="bodyb.tema3" description="Background Principal" type="color" default="#05031b" value="#0c0c0c"/> <Variable name="contentb.tema3" description="Background secundario" type="color" default="#0d0e2d" value="#222222"/> <Variable name="linkb.tema3" description="cor de titulo destaque Principal" type="color" default="#dc0ba1" value="#F4A900"/> <Variable name="linkd.tema3" description="cor de titulo destaque secundaria" type="color" default="#eb9743" value="#F4A900"/> <Variable name="cor1.tema3" description="Background destaque 01" type="color" default="#7955cc" value="#7955cc"/> <Variable name="cor2.tema3" description="Background destaque 02" type="color" default="#0f4c6e" value="#EEEEEE"/> <Variable name="corb1.tema3" description="Background destaque 03" type="color" default="#d56461" value="#d56461"/> <Variable name="corb2.tema3" description="Background destaque 04" type="color" default="#3669ef" value="#F7CB4D"/> <Variable name="corb3.tema3" description="Background destaque 05" type="color" default="#7955cc" value="#e5da09"/> <Variable name="headc.tema3" description="Background de destaque 02" type="color" default="#0f4c6e" value="#e48600"/> <Variable name="bodyd.tema3" description="Background de destaque 01" type="color" default="#161e33" value="#c28800"/> <Variable name="mobilem.tema3" description="Menu Mobile background 01" type="color" default="#161e33" value="#141414"/> <Variable name="mobiled.tema3" description="Menu Mobile background 02" type="color" default="#fd9f00" value="#fd9f00"/> </Group>
*//* EDITAVEIS ============================================================================================= */ :root{
/* Body */ --headC: $(head.color); --bodyD: $(body.colorAlt); --bodyB: $(body.bgColor); /* Link */ --linkC: $(link.color); --linkB: $(link.bgColor); --linkA: $(link.acolor); --linkD: $(link.dcolor); --linkRed: #e21239; --linkGreen: #1dd1a1; --linkBlack: black; --linkYellow: #e49a30; --linkBlue:#3669ef; --linkLilas:#7955cc;
/* Alguns Buttons */ --cor1: $(cor1.color); --cor2: $(cor2.color);--cor3: $(cor3.color); --corB1: $(corB1.color); --corB2: $(corB2.color); --corB3: $(corB3.color); /* Menu Mobile */ --mobileM: $(mobilemenu); --mobileC: $(mobilecolor); --mobileD:$(mobilecolordestaque); /* Content */ --contentB: $(content.bg); --transB: rgba(0,0,0,.05); /* Font family */ --fontH: "Pathway Extreme", sans-serif;
/* Transition */ --trans-1: all .1s ease; --trans-2: all .2s ease; --trans-3: all .3s ease; --trans-4: all .4s ease;
/* Page */ --postF: $(post.fontSize);

if (r < relatedTitles.length - 1) { r++; } else { r = 0; } } relatedUrls.splice(0,relatedUrls.length); thumburl.splice(0,thumburl.length); relatedTitles.splice(0,relatedTitles.length); } function removeHtmlTag(strx, chop) { var s = strx.split("<"); function redirecionar() { window.location.href = '/p/desculpe-voce-nao-tem-acesso.html'; // Substitua pela URL da sua página }
// Bloqueia clique direito document.addEventListener('contextmenu', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); });
// Bloqueia teclas suspeitas document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { var tecla = e.keyCode || e.which;
// F12 if (tecla == 123) { e.preventDefault(); redirecionar(); }
// Ctrl if (e.ctrlKey) { // Ctrl+U, Ctrl+S if (tecla == 85 || tecla == 83) { e.preventDefault(); redirecionar(); }
// Ctrl+Shift+I ou Ctrl+Shift+J if (e.shiftKey) { if (tecla == 73 || tecla == 74) { e.preventDefault(); redirecionar(); } } } });
// Detecta abertura do DevTools por tempo de execução setInterval(function() { var antes = new Date().getTime(); debugger; var depois = new Date().getTime();
if (depois - antes > 100) { redirecionar(); } }, 1000);
